'''fotagaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:azoted|azoted]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| f-t-g
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:azoted|azoted]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| fotagaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || fotagithi || fotagiji || fotagishi || fotagiki
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || fotaguthu || fotaguju || fotagushu || fotaguku
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || fotaguthu || fotaguju || fotagushu || fotaguku
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || fotagufthuf || fotagufjuf || fotagufshuf || fotagufkuf
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || fotagethe || fotageje || fotageshe || fotageke
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || fotagotho || fotagojo || fotagosho || fotagoko
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || fotagotho || fotagojo || fotagosho || fotagoko
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || fotagofthof || fotagofjof || fotagofshof || fotagofkof
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || fotagïfthïf || fotagïfjïf || fotagïfshïf || fotagïfkïf
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || fotagïfthïf || fotagïfjïf || fotagïfshïf || fotagïfkïf
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || fotagïfthïf || fotagïfjïf || fotagïfshïf || fotagïfkïf
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || fotagïfthïf || fotagïfjïf || fotagïfshïf || fotagïfkïf
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || fotagæthæ || fotagæjæ || fotagæshæ || fotagækæ
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || fotagatha || fotagaja || fotagasha || fotagaka
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || fotagatha || fotagaja || fotagasha || fotagaka
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || fotagafthaf || fotagafjaf || fotagafshaf || fotagafkaf
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || fotagasha
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || fotagshëasha
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || fotagroasha
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || fotagmuasha
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || fotagyaasha
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || gofotagnkshëasha
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || gofotagnkroasha
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || gofotagnkmuasha
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || gofotagnkyaasha
|-
| [[comparative]].none || fotatagasha
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || fotatagshëasha
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || fotatagroasha
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || fotatagmuasha
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || fotatagyaasha
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || gofotatagnkshëasha
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || gofotatagnkroasha
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || gofotatagnkmuasha
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || gofotatagnkyaasha
|-
| [[superlative]].none || fetægasha
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || fetægshëasha
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || fetægroasha
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || fetægmuasha
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || fetægyaasha
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || gofetægnkshëasha
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || gofetægnkroasha
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || gofetægnkmuasha
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || gofetægnkyaasha
|-
| [[negative]].none || fotfagasha
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || fotfagshëasha
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || fotfagroasha
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || fotfagmuasha
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || fotfagyaasha
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || gofotfagnkshëasha
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || gofotfagnkroasha
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || gofotfagnkmuasha
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || gofotfagnkyaasha
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
[[Category:Words c2e237e]]
{{wordpage|d176386}}
